ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genre(s) of the movie */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie in dollars */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross earnings of the movie */,
  "title_year" INTEGER /* Release year of the movie */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDB score of the movie */,
  "ROI" INTEGER /* Return on Investment (ROI) of the movie */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Exact release date of the movie */,
  "budget_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the budget */,
  "gross_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the gross earnings */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie trailer */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the movie poster */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline or catchphrase of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genres FOREIGN KEY ("genres") REFERENCES genres ("genre_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Director's nationality */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Director's birth date */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Director's death date (if applicable) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* List of awards won by the director */,
  "notable_works" TEXT /* List of notable works by the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre (for hierarchical genre structure) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the genre was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the genre was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie the cast member is associated with */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the cast member in the movie */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "character_description" TEXT /* Description of the character */,
  "actor_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the actor */,
  "actor_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  "actor_birth_date" TEXT /* Actor's birth date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the movie (1-5) */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, magazine) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "imdb_score" REAL /* IMDB score of the movie */,
  "num_voted_users" INTEGER /* Number of users who voted */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Best Director, Best Actor) */,
  "award_ceremony" TEXT /* Name of the award ceremony */,
  "award_ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_user_interaction" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the movie */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., watch, rate) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (if applicable) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or review text given by the user (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_user_interaction_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_user_interaction_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_similarity" (
  "similarity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similarity entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being compared */,
  "similar_movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar movie */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Score representing the similarity between the two movies */,
  "similarity_type" TEXT /* Type of similarity (e.g., content, style) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similarity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_similarity_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_similarity_similar_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
